videos.video_subject: Brazil 7-1 Germany: the Mineirazo, the worst humiliation in World Cup history
videos.video_script: On July eighth, 2014, Brazil hosted Germany in the World Cup semi-final. Sixty thousand fans came to celebrate. Then in just six minutes, Germany scored four goals. By half-time it was five to nothing. Players were crying. Fans were crying. It finished seven to one — the worst defeat in Brazil's entire history, at their own World Cup. They call it the Mineirazo. And Brazil has never truly recovered.
